rationale: Section 11.31 governs pollution control property exemptions and explicitly excludes residential property. Increasing the homestead exemption amount in §11.13(b) has no bearing on this separate exemption regime.
quote: Property used for residential purposes, or for recreational, park, or scenic uses as defined by Section 23.81, is ineligible for an exemption under this section.
_note: No conflict. §11.31 is a distinct exemption category unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b).
